**Current state:** Character moved to frame area. Green frame shrunk to 99 px. Two remaining S blocks (9 px each) at rows 32-34 and 44-46 inside the frame.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current S block positions and character position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
s_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'S']
w_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 50]

print("S blocks:", [(n['pixels'], min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']), min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])) for n in s_blocks])
print("W character:", [(n['pixels'], min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']), min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])) for n in w_blocks])

# Try RIGHT action to reduce S blocks
result = action(['RIGHT'])
print("Action result:", result)

# Check new state
seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
s_blocks2 = [n for n in seg2['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'S']
print("S blocks after RIGHT:", [(n['pixels'], min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']), min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])) for n in s_blocks2])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
